body: This PR reintroduces the missing 4/3 factor for relative vorticity at cubed sphere panel corners, accounting for the reduction in circulation area centered at these corners compared to interior vertices. Because vorticity is computed as circulation divided by area, this reduced area requires the 4/3 scaling, fixing the ~25% underestimation at corners.
title: Fix cubed sphere corner vorticity (restore 4/3 scaling)
Fill vertical halos for conformal cubed sphere fields
